response.overview: A highly emotional family movie about friendship and faith, that reminds us all what really makes us winners.  Eliran Ben-Tovim is a coacher in the Super League who has done a foul in the biggest game of the season. When the unification rules that he should stop coaching, he finds himself moving to the northern side of the country to coach a failing children team in the middleschool. In the north, Eliran discovers a talentless team, that never won a game. Against all odds, Eliran tries to lead his new team to victory against their arch-nemesis - The "Gordon" Team.
response.title: ILANOT
